name: Workstream
description: A workstream document model that allows the user to create workstreams under a network organization

global.schema:
type WorkstreamState {
  code: String
  title: String
  status: WorkstreamStatus!
  client: ClientInfo
  rfp: RFP
  initialProposal: Proposal
  alternativeProposals: [Proposal!]!
  sow: PHID
  paymentTerms: PHID
  paymentRequests: [PHID!]!
}

enum WorkstreamStatus {
  RFP_DRAFT
  PREWORK_RFC
  RFP_CANCELLED
  OPEN_FOR_PROPOSALS
  PROPOSAL_SUBMITTED
  NOT_AWARDED
  AWARDED
  IN_PROGRESS
  FINISHED
}

type Proposal {
  id: OID!
  sow: PHID!
  paymentTerms: PHID!
  status: ProposalStatus!
  author: ProposalAuthor!
}

enum ProposalStatus {
  DRAFT
  SUBMITTED
  ACCEPTED
  REJECTED
}

type ClientInfo {
  id: PHID!
  name: String
  icon: URL
}

type RFP {
  id: PHID!
  title: String!
}

type ProposalAuthor {
  id: PHID!
  name: String
  icon: URL
}
global.initialValue:
{
  "code": null,
  "title": null,
  "status": "RFP_DRAFT",
  "client": null,
  "rfp": null,
  "initialProposal": null,
  "alternativeProposals": [],
  "sow": null,
  "paymentTerms": null,
  "paymentRequests": []
}

operations.name: EDIT_WORKSTREAM
operations.schema:
input EditWorkstreamInput {
  code: String
  title: String
  status: WorkstreamStatus
  sowId: PHID
  paymentTerms: PHID
}

operations.name: EDIT_CLIENT_INFO
SET_REQUEST_FOR_PROPOSAL
REMOVE_PAYMENT_REQUEST
EDIT_INITIAL_PROPOSAL
ADD_ALTERNATIVE_PROPOSAL
operations.schema:
input AddAlternativeProposalInput {
  id: OID!
  sowId: PHID
  paymentTermsId: PHID
  status: ProposalStatus
  proposalAuthor: ProposalAuthorInput
}

operations.name: EDIT_ALTERNATIVE_PROPOSAL
operations.schema:
input EditAlternativeProposalInput {
  id: OID!
  sowId: PHID
  paymentTermsId: PHID
  status: ProposalStatus
  proposalAuthor: ProposalAuthorInput
}

operations.name: REMOVE_ALTERNATIVE_PROPOSAL
